installCommand: APP_DIR=; for dir in . frontend ../frontend ../../frontend; do if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then APP_DIR="$dir"; break; fi; done; if [ -z "$APP_DIR" ]; then echo "Unable to find frontend package.json from $(pwd)"; exit 1; fi; cd "$APP_DIR" && npm install
buildCommand: START_DIR="$PWD"; APP_DIR=; for dir in . frontend ../frontend ../../frontend; do if [ -f "$dir/package.json" ]; then APP_DIR="$dir"; break; fi; done; if [ -z "$APP_DIR" ]; then echo "Unable to find frontend package.json from $(pwd)"; exit 1; fi; cd "$APP_DIR" && npm run build && APP_ABS="$PWD" && if [ "$START_DIR" = "$APP_ABS" ]; then mkdir -p ../dist && cp -R dist/. ../dist/; else mkdir -p "$START_DIR/dist" && cp -R dist/. "$START_DIR/dist/"; fi
